visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a neutral-toned beige top, sits at a light-colored wooden table in a well-lit indoor setting. In front of her is a clear plastic bottle. She begins by using a spoon to scoop vanilla ice cream from a large 'Poki' tub and carefully places it into the bottle. (2) She continues the process, adding several scoops of ice cream. Then, she picks up a blue plastic bag of ice and pours cubes into the bottle. Next, she pours a white liquid (almond milk) from a light blue carton into the bottle, accidentally spilling a small amount on the table. (3) She presents a brown rectangular box labeled 'SERY BOX'. She opens it and removes a small packet, then squeezes a dark brown liquid concentrate (coffee) into the bottle. The dark liquid creates a marble-like swirling effect as it mixes with the milk. (4) She puts the lid on the bottle and shakes it vigorously with both hands. After shaking, she adds a black straw and takes a long sip, looking directly at the camera with an expressive, pleasantly surprised facial expression. A brown leather bucket bag is seen on the table next to her. (5) She gestures with more coffee packets in her hand while speaking enthusiastically. She demonstrates placing the finished drink into her brown bag. The video concludes with her holding up three packets of the coffee concentrate close to the lens while continuing her narration.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: POV 台灣人看了會療癒死了的影片. [Subtitle]: 今天要做. [Slogan]: 無罪惡 冰淇淋咖啡拿鐵☕️. (2) [Variety]: (逃跑). [Subtitle]: 若無其事地把冰淇淋放回去😮‍💨. (3) [Subtitle]: 你說我加很多高熱量東西嗎？ 不用擔心. (4) [Subtitle]: 不過我這個人啊...真的很常把東西灑出來😂. [Variety]: 習慣了. (5) [Subtitle]: 有一個秘密的材料. 這個是杏仁奶. (6) [Subtitle]: 每次到牛奶都會變成這樣. [Logo]: SERY BOX. (7) [Slogan]: ❤️SERYCUT 輕盈咖啡❤️. [Subtitle]: 裡面包含 750mg 的藤黃果萃取物. (8) [Subtitle]: 可以讓你輕盈一點🥰. 用瓜地馬拉 + 巴西的阿拉比卡 真實咖啡豆製作的原液！ (9) [Subtitle]: 冷水 熱水 都 OK 直接加一包就好. (10) [Subtitle]: 發現杏仁奶加太多了. 又多加了一點咖啡進去☕️. (11) [Subtitle]: 我回韓國的時候幾乎天天都喝這個. [Variety]: 瘋掉了！！ (12) [Subtitle]: 老實說...比我在義大利喝過的咖啡還好喝. [Variety]: 超級無敵好喝. (13) [Slogan]: 其實這個韓國原價 大套組一萬多超誇張！！ 但我這邊進行全台最低價 38 折起！！！ (14) [Slogan]: 今年最後一次最低價 連結請確認我的 IG 主頁！！ (15) [Slogan]: 現在購買 Serycut 輕盈咖啡大套組 🌷就送專屬咖啡瓶🍼 數量有限！ (16) [Subtitle]: 特別是炸物、甜點完全戒不掉的人. 有這個一起喝真的超方便. (17) [Subtitle]: 記得先註冊完 EZway 實名認證 然後再下單唷~~~~！

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator filming a lifestyle/product demonstration vlog.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, straight dark hair, wearing a simple beige or light-tan ribbed short-sleeved top and light blue manicured nails.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern indoor room with cream-colored walls, a wooden dining table, and soft ambient lighting from what appears to be a nearby window or floor lamp.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a cheerful, upbeat acoustic piano melody in a major key. A high-pitched female voice speaks with high energy and a friendly tone. A soft percussive thud is heard as she starts the activity. (2) A rhythmic scraping sound of a spoon hitting the side of a tub is clearly audible. The speaker's pitch modulates upward as she expresses mock concern about calories. (3) The distinct 'crackle' and 'rustle' of a plastic ice bag being handled occurs, followed by the percussive 'tinkling' sounds of ice cubes dropping into a plastic container. (4) A consistent 'glug' and splash sound of liquid pouring into the bottle follows. The vocal delivery remains fast-paced with frequent rising intonations indicating excitement. (5) A sharp mechanical 'click' and 'pop' SFX accompanies the opening of a box and the tearing of a packet. The sound of a thick liquid concentrate being squeezed out is heard under the voice. (6) A sequence of rapid shaking sounds—liquid agitating inside a capped bottle—occurs, matching the visual movement. The BGM remains steady in the background. (7) A soft 'slurp' through a straw is heard, followed by a vocalized 'Mmm' and a sharp increase in the speaker's volume as she praises the taste. (8) A dull thud as a bottle is placed inside a leather bag. The audio concludes with a final persuasive call-to-action delivered at a high speech rate with clear articulation.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Recipe Demonstration -> Product Introduction -> Taste Test -> Limited Time Offer -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote Serybox's weight-management coffee concentrate by demonstrating how it can be used to make a delicious, low-guilt latte at home, while offering a specific discount code and gift.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator prominently displays the brand box, explains its weight-loss benefits (Garcinia extract), and provides specific pricing and purchasing instructions via her social media profile.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-engagement social media advertisement using a DIY latte tutorial to bridge lifestyle content with a product pitch.
